message:
🌱 Add atlantis: Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis entirely mission (#929)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-4471-autodownloading-terraform-1-8-2-breaks-atlantis-entirely",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis entirely",
+    "description": "Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis entirely. This issue affects 193+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n### Community Note\n\n* Please vote on this issue by adding a \ud83d\udc4d [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis entirely",
+        "description": "## what\n\nShort-term fix for #4471. With this change Atlantis will only download terraform version `1.8.1` or lower, still respecting constraints set in `required_version` field. If `required_version` is set to `>=1.8.2` or higher Atlantis will fallback to default version. \n\n## why\n\nTerraform\n```yaml\ndownloading terraform version 1.8.2 at \"https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.8.2/terraform_1.8.2_linux_amd64.zip?checksum=file:https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.8.2/terraform_1.8.2_SHA256SUMS\": expected a single file: /tmp/getter1796155136/archive\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade atlantis to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade atlantis:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade atlantis atlantis/atlantis --namespace atlantis\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis\nhelm list -n atlantis\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Autodownloading Terraform 1.8.2 breaks Atlantis\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## what\n\nShort-term fix for #4471. With this change Atlantis will only download terraform version `1.8.1` or lower, still respecting constraints set in `required_version` field. If `required_version` is set to `>=1.8.2` or higher Atlantis will fallback to default version.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "downloading terraform version 1.8.2 at \"https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.8.2/terraform_1.8.2_linux_amd64.zip?checksum=file:https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/1.8.2/terraform_1.8.2_SHA256SUMS\": expected a single file: /tmp/getter1796155136/archive",
+        "terraform {\n  required_version = \">= 1.1.0, < 2.0.0\"\n  ...",
+        "terraform {\n  required_version = \"1.8.1\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/issues/4471",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/4474"
+    },
+    "reactions": 193,
+    "comments": 24,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with atlantis installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },

+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:29:27.518Z",
